insight: Master Bot plays suboptimally against T1 Animus rushes (Elyot Animus), as a player reported winning games against it using this opening even when the strategy appears questionable against human opponents. In at least one reported case the player used T1 Animus into smorcus successfully against Master Bot.
author: siepu
context: siepu noting that T1 Animus into smorcus worked against Master Bot despite being likely suboptimal against humans, prompting a discussion of real P1 lines in red sets.
